detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use tmr_manager driver.

sect1.title: xtmr_manager_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTmr_manager driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest using the driver.

sect1.title: xtmr_manager_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTmr_manager driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xtmr_manager_intr_tapp_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTmr_manager driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in interrupt mode for transmission of the data.

sect1.title: xtmr_manager_low_level_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTmr_manager driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low-level driver functions and macros of the driver.

sect1.title: xtmr_manager_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XTmr_manager driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in polled mode.
